audit_items.proof_trace: The second loop iterates over `verifiedReports.length` (L155) with no explicit `require(verifiedReports.length == unverifiedReports.length)` guard; however, length parity is enforced by the behavioral contract of `i_streamsVerifierProxy`, which is declared `immutable` (L95) and cannot be replaced post-deployment. The Chainlink V0.5.0 VerifierProxy `verifyBulk` is all-or-nothing: it returns exactly one verified report per input or reverts the entire call — confirmed by MockVerifierProxy (L24: `new bytes[](unverifiedReports.length)`) and all test fixtures. No attacker-controlled path exists to inject a mismatched proxy or bypass the PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE gate.
